categoryNames.n100_things: 100 Things to do Before High School
categoryNames.lok_atla: Legend of Korra / Avatar: The Last Airbender
categoryNames.jokes: Jokes On You / Pull My Finger
categoryNames.personality: The Most Random Personality Quiz Ever
categoryNames.space: Outta' This World / The Final Frontier

results.ratherDesc1: How about this is our little secret? Those were some scary answers.
results.ratherDesc2: You'll be President some day. Spot-on decisions. And we will just ignore the bad ones you made.
results.ratherDesc3: Yikes. What interesting choices (backs away from you slowly).
results.ratherDesc4: Those were some solid choices. Go tell your mom, she'll get you something nice.
results.ratherDesc5: Well, you definitely raised some eyebrows. Great job!
results.ratherDesc6: Wowsers. You're sure one of a kind. Unrelated question: do you wear a tinfoil hat?
results.personalityDesc1: Stop holding on to your ugly past. You're dirty and tattered. It's time to let go.
results.personalityHead2: You're the cutest Corgi on Internet.
results.personalityDesc2: Everyone wants to pinch and hug you and you have 4 million views. Even the people who are deathly allergic.
results.personalityHead3: Your'e a Salt & Vinegar potato chip.
results.personalityDesc3: Some people adore you and can't get enough. Some people think you are terrible.
results.personalityDesc4: Well, he didn't have one, but it'd be you, smarty pants. Weird pants, but mostly smarty.
results.personalityDesc5: People fight after you and need you in a pinch. But you can be easily forgotten and left behind.
results.personalityDesc6: How are you able to read this?
results.personalityDesc7: Kudos for being such a hard worker. But you're in over your head with that cookie chunk.
results.personalityDesc9: You're so adorably gross. Everyone wuvs your wittle sniffer. Ok, that'll do! Stop please.

brainHub.emptyBrainSection_0: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.emptyBrainSection_1: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.emptyBrainSection_2: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.emptyBrainSection_3: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.emptyBrainSection_4: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.emptyBrainSection_5: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.emptyBrainSection_6: Take some quizzes to fill your brain with knowledge and nonsense!
brainHub.trait_food: Jeez. When was the last time you ate?
brainHub.trait_rather: You made some fantastic pointless decisions.
brainHub.trait_color: So you'd also ace the crayon quiz.
brainHub.trait_love: Your crush called and is wondering what you're doing tonight.
brainHub.trait_family: You know blood is thicker than water. But not syrup.
brainHub.trait_friends: You're the good friend that deletes bad selfies outtakes.
brainHub.trait_quotes: How big are your ears? You can sure listen.
brainHub.trait_dwellings: You're seen at all the right places.
brainHub.trait_fighting: You got your black belt in MAGIC!
brainHub.trait_animals: You're an animal lover, but are you a potty trainer?
brainHub.trait_gadgets: Nerd alert! Where are your glasses?
brainHub.trait_music: Now it's stuck in your head!
brainHub.trait_hair: You there, big hair, don't care.
brainHub.trait_gross: Eww. That was disgusting. Clean yourself up.
brainHub.trait_anatomy: You know head, shoulders, knees and guts, knees and guts.
brainHub.trait_neighbors: You've kicked a ball into your neighbor's yard too many times, it seems.
brainHub.trait_events: You're the life of the party. Even when you're the only one.
brainHub.trait_names: You don't forget a name. Or a face. Or a butt.
brainHub.trait_babies: You must have one clean diaper.
brainHub.trait_dancing: Everyone wants to watch you whiiiiiiip.
brainHub.trait_vacations: Seems like you take a lot of pictures of your feet in the sand.
brainHub.trait_chronology: You know what time it is.
brainHub.trait_space: Houston, we don't really have any problems. You won the universe.
brainHub.trait_close_ups: Whoa. You should take a giant step back!
brainHub.trait_numbers: You can count. Not sure if you can spell.
brainHub.trait_first_meetings: When you meet people, it's LOL at first sight.
brainHub.trait_catchphrases: Time to get your own catchphrase.
brainHub.trait_round_stuff: Hey, when you know a shape, you know a shape.
brainHub.trait_shows_within_shows: So you're a DOUBLE TV expert.
brainHub.trait_green: So you're definitely not color blind.
brainHub.trait_impossible: And they said it couldn't be done. You're a wizard.
brainHub.trait_arts_crafts: You must know your way around a scrapbook.
brainHub.trait_henry_danger: You're an expert on heroics and keeping secrets. BTW, can you spare a piece of gum?
brainHub.trait_wits_academy: You've got the smarts to guard any realm.
brainHub.trait_bella_bulldogs: You know your way around the feild and never fumble.
brainHub.trait_nrdd: You know your stuff 4 times as well as most, but you also have 4 times the laundry to do.
brainHub.trait_n100_things: You probably know way more than 100 things about 100 Things.
brainHub.trait_game_shakers: Gaming is your thing and you own any high-score screen.
brainHub.trait_every_witch_way: You bring the magic that makes everyday life more interesting.
brainHub.trait_lok_atla: Ain't nothing you can't bend. All others respect your skills.
brainHub.trait_pr_dino_charge: You're favorite things are probably dinosaurs, robots and dinosaur-robots.
brainHub.trait_pr_megaforce: When you and your squad get together, things get legendary.
brainHub.trait_sam_and_cat: Opposites attract and so do you.
brainHub.trait_spongebob: You're in an elite club of Spongeheads.
brainHub.trait_tmnt: You fight for what's right. Especially the right pizza-toppings.
brainHub.trait_victorious: You get jazz hands all around!!!!
